column1: # Self-expiring baseline of known, ticketed parity violations for
# Each row must match a violation currently reproducing in the tree, using
# the exact scope/identifier values the owning assertion's fail branch
#   assertion 5 (CLAST_* vs docs/reference/config.md): scope = the var name,
#     identifier = the literal "undocumented" (assertion 5 has exactly one
#   assertion 6 (AskUserQuestion option cap): scope = the SKILL.md path,
# Self-expiry: a row that stops matching a live violation is itself a hard
# error (delete it). A row with an empty/placeholder ticket is itself a hard
# error. This file only ever shrinks as BDS-100/BDS-101 get fixed.
